data.name: Hollow Memories
data.detailed_description:
Hollow Memories is daily life simulation game. You recently moved back to your hometown to find a job. After moving into a suspiciously cheap apartment, you find out that it's haunted by a pair of sexy ghosts, and you're stuck with them until the curse is broken. With the help of a small spirit, discover a way to break the curse, and help the ghosts move on by filling their hollow memories. Or is there more to this?

FEATURES

  • Living with 2 sexy ghosts!

  • Uncover an intriguing plot about family and second chances!

  • 60+ Hand drawn, frame by frame animated scenes!

GAMEPLAY

  • Explore the house!

  • Uncover memories by using memory points from playing minigames!

  • Sexy interactions with the ladies!

  • Upgrade your spirit to last longer in minigames and ghost unlocks for more scenes!

  • Try not to die!

data.short_description: You recently moved back to your hometown to find a job and move into a suspiciously cheap apartment, you find out that it's haunted by a pair of sexy ghosts, and you're stuck until the curse is broken. Discover a way to break the curse, and help the ghosts move on by filling their hollow memories.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2.0 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
